rows.description: Exchequer Annuities pro Greenl. et Brind.:
rows.notes: Clear, well-formed numbers in the rightmost columns reading 175-0-0. Vertical column lines and digits are unambiguous.
Clear reading of 4-0-0 in the pounds/shillings/pence columns; handwriting and alignment unambiguous.
Pounds '20' and trailing '-0-0' clearly aligned in the columns. Minor uncertainty in reading of the place name (handwriting), amounts are clear.
Numeric group reads 3-16-0 clearly. Slight uncertainty in spelling of the place name, but amounts are well aligned and unambiguous.

Shillings '9' is clear. Pence column has a dark blot/ink smudge that resembles a '1' but could be bleed; chose '1' based on a small upward stroke in the pence column aligned with other pence digits. Column alignment otherwise clear.
Digits read as 0-1-0; columns are aligned and digits are legible despite slightly faded ink.
Large centered script acting as a section header; no monetary amounts present.

rows.description: Yardington Rect. pro 5 ann. mie. 1730 a Tho. Rounsettor
rows.notes: Pounds '50' is clearly written in the pounds column; shillings/pence columns blank (interpreted as 0). Some uncertainty in exact paleography of the descriptive text but amount alignment is clear.

Shillings '12' is legible. Pence shows '0' with a small halfpenny mark (loop/ob) just to the right — interpreted as a halfpenny (0.5). Some uncertainty in place-name reading but the monetary figures and halfpenny sign are visible.

rows.description: - Gunsewwoy pro Bien. & Dimd. al An. 1734
rows.notes: Numbers read clearly as 2-10-0. Handwriting of the descriptive name is somewhat uncertain (I transcribed as seen) but the amounts are aligned and legible.
Pounds '9' is clearly in the pounds column; shillings/pence blank (interpreted as 0). Minor uncertainty in capitalization/spelling of the name, amounts clear.
Single digit '5' in pounds column, aligned and clear. No shillings/pence shown.
Pounds '20' clear. Description is somewhat faded and uncertain in spelling but monetary amount alignment is unambiguous.
Centered section header in larger script; no amounts present.
Date written in left margin adjacent to this receipts section. No monetary amounts on the same line.
Numeric group reads 62-17-6 clearly in pounds/shillings/pence columns. Slight uncertainty in the last letters of the descriptive place-name ('Cardlen' reading) but amounts are very clear.
Amount reads 2-15-0 clearly. Leading dash indicates it is a sub-item; handwriting and numbers legible.

rows.description: Mudenham pr 4ta parte an: ad part Net
rows.notes: Amounts read as 1-13-4; the description (place and Latin phrasing) is moderately ambiguous but numerals align well to the columns.

Pounds and shillings (27-13) are clear. Pence column shows '1' with a small halfpenny mark (loop) immediately to the right — interpreted as 1½d (pence whole 1 with 0.5 fraction). Handwriting of the description is moderately unclear which slightly lowers confidence.

rows.description: Excheq Annuity pro dim: cau: ad part annum:
rows.notes: Amount 25-0-0 clearly visible and well aligned. Description in Latin abbreviated but legible enough to identify as an Exchequer annuity item.
Subtotal line beneath the receipts shows 119-18-11½. Numbers are well aligned and the halfpenny mark is visible after the pence; interpreted as 11 pence + 0.5.
Centered small heading introducing the next receipts subsection; no amounts on this line.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Wilcock for Dr Hortridge Benefaction Mid:1759
rows.notes: Amount reads clearly as 100-0-0. Description is slightly abbreviated/archaic but readable enough to identify payer and purpose.

rows.description: Recvd Cash of Mr Payne by Bill on ditto acct Janry 1759
rows.notes: Amount 100-0-0 clearly visible. The wording 'by Bill on ditto acct' is legible though abbreviated; numeric alignment unambiguous.

rows.description: Recvd of Mr Buckley Plate Money
rows.notes: Reads as 0-8-0 (eight shillings). Pounds column shows '00', shillings '08' clearly; description legible.
Subtotal for this receipts subsection reads 208-0-0 and is clearly aligned in the totals column.
Final total at the bottom-right reads 791-4-0. Nicely aligned and legible; the label 'Summa Receptorum' is clear in the left-hand description area.
